input: Design an image analysis pipeline to count DAPI+ nuclei and Ki-67+ proliferating cells in a tissue section. Report proliferation index.
Quantify tumor area and necrotic area from H&E-stained whole slide image of a mouse xenograft.

approach: tissue detection → tumor vs stroma classification → necrosis identification

input: Quantify protein expression from a Western blot image. 4 lanes: control, treatment 1, treatment 2, treatment 3. Loading control: beta-actin.

expected_details.statistical: 3+ biological replicates needed for statistical comparison

input: Analyze colocalization of protein A (green) and protein B (red) in confocal microscopy images.

expected_details.thresholds: Costes automatic thresholding preferred over manual

input: Quantify cell migration from a wound healing (scratch) assay. Images at 0h, 6h, 12h, 24h.

expected_details.method: threshold-based gap detection or edge detection
expected_details.controls: mitomycin C treated control to distinguish migration from proliferation

input: Count colonies from a clonogenic survival assay. 6-well plate, crystal violet stained. Conditions: 0, 2, 4, 6, 8 Gy radiation.

expected_details.method: automated colony counting with size threshold (>50 cells = colony)

input: Score HER2 IHC staining in breast cancer tissue according to ASCO/CAP guidelines.
Extract morphometric features from a cell population image: area, perimeter, circularity, aspect ratio, solidity.
Analyze a 7-color multiplex immunofluorescence panel (CD3, CD8, CD68, PD-L1, PanCK, Ki-67, DAPI) on a tumor tissue section.

spatial_metrics: T-cell density in tumor vs stroma

input: Measure spheroid growth from brightfield time-lapse images. Conditions: control, drug A, drug B. Images every 24h for 7 days.

expected_details.segmentation: edge detection or Hough circle transform on brightfield
expected_details.analysis: growth curves with area under curve (AUC) comparison
